nasb.text: Indeed, if a man should live many years, let him rejoice in them all, and let him remember the days of darkness, for they will be many. Everything that is to come will be futility.

esv.text: So if a person lives many years, let him rejoice in them all; but let him remember that the days of darkness will be many. All that comes is vanity.

cnv.text: 人無論多長壽，都當樂在其中，不過他要想到黑暗的日子，因為這些日子將會很多；要來的，都是虛空的。

ccb.text: 人一生不论活多久，都要活得快乐，但不要忘记死后有许多黑暗的日子。将来的一切都是虚空。

csbs.text: 人活多少年， 就当快乐多少年； 但他当记住还有黑暗的日子， 因为这些日子将会很多—— 要来的一切都是虚空。
